notes: PE buyout validates business quality, but delisting closes public Stage 3 tracking.
APR-style growth needs repeat demand and channel durability, not viral device demand alone.
Classys-like platform needs installed base, consumables, OPM and FCF.

Policy relief is not Green while procedure volume and hospital utilization are disrupted.
M&A target rally is event premium until close, integration and listed bridge are visible.
